title: [RELOAD] L_Ender's Cataclysm Eyes
description: A new look at the structure search eyes added by the L_Ender's Cataclysm mod.
body:
# ✨What is this resource pack?
**[RELOAD] L_Ender's Catacliysm Eyes** - This is a resource pack that changes the appearance of the structure search eyes from a well-known mod [L_Ender's Cataclysm](https://modrinth.com/project/46KJle7n), making them more suitable for the vanilla style.


# 🔄What's changed:
_The textures remain stylistically faithful to standard Minecraft, but have a modern and polished look. Some animations have also been updated._
  
## Items
<details>
<summary>Guiding Eyes</summary>

![Guiding Eyse 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc8cfee71472d33bc2a77a9128d1750133f7e986.png)

![Guiding Eyse 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02d659de566f3038ee970977beca242a7f563f36.png)

</details>


## Items animations
<details>
<summary>Animations</summary>

_~~The author is busy with them right now...~~_

</details>










# How to start?
1. Install Neo/forge [L_Ender's Cataclysm](https://modrinth.com/project/46KJle7n).
2. Download resource pack .zip.
3. Move archive to the folder "resourcepacks".
4. Have a nice game!

# ⠀
_*I used a translator because my English is not very good, please keep that in mind._
